text: Dell R230 runs Ubuntu 22.04 on 192.168.1.23. BCM5720 eno1 is spare and eno2 is the primary interface on the showroom/device network.

FortiGate 100E has office network 192.168.16.0/20 on LACP port3 and port4, showroom/device network 192.168.1.0/24 on fortilink port11 and port12, AP management VLAN32 on port5, and showroom server network 192.168.48.0/24.
When an interface reports no-carrier but the NIC is enumerated, first check cable and peer switch port state before diagnosing hardware failure.
When two routed FortiGate connected networks cannot reach each other, verify route visibility and firewall policy before blaming switch VLAN state.
For WAN VIP publishing issues, inspect both the VIP mapping and the inbound firewall policy service match; either side can break the port forward.
